properties.comment: Lineage with semantics query optimization - TPC-H queries
properties.entry: -dl_load_fds:TRUE
-dl_load_fds:TRUE, -Osemantic_opt:TRUE

Q(l_return, l_linestat, sum(l_quant), sum(l_extp), sum(l_extp*(1-l_disc)), sum(l_extp*(1-l_disc)*(1+l_tax)), avg(l_quant), avg(l_extp), avg(l_disc), count(x1)) :- lineitem(x1, x2, x3, x4, l_quant, l_extp, l_disc, l_tax, l_return, l_linestat, l_shipdate, x5, x6, x7, x8, x9), l_shipdate <= '1998-09-01'.
RP('R','F', 36511, 36570841.24, 34738472.87580004, 36169060.11219294, 25.0590253946465340, 25100.09693891558, 0.050027453671928686, 1457).
ANS: Q.
LINEAGE FOR lineitem FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

Q1(s_account_bal,s_name,n_name,p_key,s_cost,p_manu,s_addr,s_phone,s_comment) :- nation(n_key,n_name,r_key,x1), region(r_key,'EUROPE',x2), supplier(s_key,s_name,s_addr,n_key,s_phone,s_account_bal,s_comment), part(p_key,x3,p_manu,x4,p_type,15,x5,x6,x7), partsupp(p_key,s_key,x8,s_cost,x9), p_type LIKE '%TIN'.
Q2(p_key,min(s_cost)) :- Q1(x1,x2,x3,p_key,s_cost,x5,x6,x7,x8).
Q(s_account_bal,s_name,n_name,p_key,s_cost,p_manu,s_addr,s_phone,s_comment) :- Q1(s_account_bal,s_name,n_name,p_key,s_cost,p_manu,s_addr,s_phone,s_comment), Q2(p_key,s_cost).
RP( 6820.35,'Supplier#000000007','UNITED KINGDOM',186,252.84,'Manufacturer#2','s,4TicNGB4uO6PaSqNBUq','33-990-965-2201','s unwind silently furiously regular courts. final requests are deposits. requests wake quietly blit').
ANS: Q.
LINEAGE FOR supplier FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

Q(l_orderkey,o_orderdate,o_shippriority,sum(l_extendedprice*(1 - l_discount))) :- customer(c_custkey, C1, C2, C3, C4, C5, 'BUILDING', C6), orders(l_orderkey, c_custkey, O1, O2, o_orderdate, O3, O4, o_shippriority, O5), lineitem(l_orderkey, X1, X2, X3, X4, l_extendedprice, l_discount, X5, X6, X7, l_shipdate, X8, X9, X10, X11, X12), o_orderdate < '1995-03-15', l_shipdate > '1995-03-15'.
RP(998, CAST('1994-11-26' AS date), 0, 11785.548600000002).
ANS: Q.
LINEAGE FOR customer FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

Q1(l_okey) :- lineitem(l_okey,x1,x2,x3,x4,x5,x6,x7,x8,x9,x10,l_comm_date,l_receipt_date,x11,x12,x13), l_comm_date < l_receipt_date.
Q(o_opriority,count(1)) :- orders(l_okey,x1,x2,x3,o_odate,o_opriority,x4,x5,x6), Q1(l_okey), o_odate >= '1993-07-01', o_odate < '1993-10-01'.
RP('1-URGENT', 9).
ANS: Q.
LINEAGE FOR orders FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

a0 | a1 | a2 | a3 | a4 | a5 | a6 | a7 | a8 | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 193 | 80 | F | 48053.18 | 1993-08-08 | 1-URGENT | Clerk#000000025 | 0 | the furiously final pin | 1350 | 52 | F | 49305.98 | 1993-08-24 | 1-URGENT | Clerk#000000635 | 0 | iously about the blithely special a | 2055 | 97 | F | 57092.26 | 1993-09-04 | 1-URGENT | Clerk#000000067 | 0 | . warhorses affix slyly blithely express instructions? fur | 2368 | 13 | F | 101240.96 | 1993-08-20 | 1-URGENT | Clerk#000000830 | 0 | t the bold instructions. carefully unusual | 3108 | 85 | F | 63278 | 1993-08-05 | 1-URGENT | Clerk#000000574 | 0 | s packages haggle furiously am | 3431 | 47 | F | 45536.27 | 1993-08-22 | 1-URGENT | Clerk#000000439 | 0 | sleep. slyly busy Tiresias a | 3463 | 89 | F | 85255.56 | 1993-08-18 | 1-URGENT | Clerk#000000545 | 0 | ding to the carefully ironic deposits | 4932 | 122 | F | 42927.07 | 1993-08-10 | 1-URGENT | Clerk#000000830 | 0 | onic foxes. enticingly reg | 5061 | 101 | F | 52190.52 | 1993-08-14 | 1-URGENT | Clerk#000000009 | 0 | e packages use fluffily according to the carefully ironic deposits. bol |

Q(n_n,sum(l_ep * (1-l_d))):- customer(c_ck,c1,c2,c_nk,c3,c4,c5,c6), orders(o_ok,c_ck,o1,o2,o_od,o3,o4,o5,o6), lineitem(o_ok,l1,l_sk,l2,l3,l_ep,l_d,l5,l6,l7,l8,l9,l10,l11,l12,l13), supplier(l_sk,s1,s2,c_nk,s3,s4,s5), nation(c_nk,n_n,n_rk,n1), region(n_rk,r_nam,r2), o_od >= '1994-01-01', o_od < '1995-01-01'.
RP('ETHIOPIA', 115183.8546).
ANS: Q.
LINEAGE FOR supplier FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

Q(sum(l_ep * l_d)):- lineitem(l1,l2,l3,l4,l_q,l_ep,l_d,l5,l6,l7,l_sd,l8,l9,l10,l11,l12), l_sd >= '1994-01-01', l_sd < '1995-01-01', l_d >= 0.05, l_d <= 0.07, l_q < 24.
RP(77949.9186).
ANS: Q.
LINEAGE FOR lineitem FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

Qnations('SAUDI ARABIA','UNITED STATES'). Qnations('UNITED STATES','SAUDI ARABIA').
Qsub(supp_nation,cust_nation,date_part('year', l_sd), l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) :- supplier(l_sk,s2,s3,s_nationkey,s4,s5,s6), lineitem(l_ok,l1,l_sk,l2,l3,l_extendedprice,l_discount,l6,l7,l8,l_sd,l9,l10,l11,l12,l13), orders(l_ok,l_ck,o1,o2,o3,o4,o5,o6,o7), customer(l_ck, c1,c2,c_nationkey,c3,c4,c5,c6), nation(s_nationkey,supp_nation,n1,n2), nation(c_nationkey,cust_nation,n3,n4), l_sd >= '1991-01-01', l_sd <= '1994-12-31', Qnations(supp_nation,cust_nation).
Q(supp_nation,cust_nation,l_year,sum(volume)) :- Qsub(supp_nation,cust_nation,l_year,volume).
RP('UNITED STATES','SAUDI ARABIA',1992,16937.222400000002).
ANS : Q.
LINEAGE FOR lineitem FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

Q2(date_part('YEAR',o_odate),l_extend*(1-l_discount),n_name) :- supplier(s_key,x1,x2,s_nkey,x3,x4,x5), nation(s_nkey,n_name,x6,x7), customer(c_ckey,x8,x9,c_nkey,x10,x11,x12,x13), nation(c_nkey,x14,n_rkey,x15), region(n_rkey,'AMERICA',x16), orders(o_okey,c_ckey,x18,x19,o_odate,x20,x21,x22,x23), lineitem(o_okey,l_pkey,s_key,x24,x25,l_extend,l_discount,x26,x27,x28,x29,x30,x31,x32,x33,x34), part(l_pkey,x35,x36,x37,'ECONOMY ANODIZED STEEL',x38,x39,x40,x41), o_odate >= '1995-01-01', o_odate < '1996-12-31'.
Q1(year, sum(CASE WHEN nation = 'BRAZIL' THEN volume ELSE 0 END), sum(volume)) :- Q2(year,volume,nation).
Q(year, x / y) :- Q1(year,X,Y).
RP(1995,0).
ANS:Q.
LINEAGE FOR lineitem FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

Q1(n_name, date_part('year',o_orderdate), ((l_ep * (1-l_discount)) - (ps_supplycost * l_quantity))) :- part(p_partkey, p_name, p1, p2, p3, p4, p5, p6, p7), supplier(s_suppkey, s1, s2, n_nationkey, s3, s4, s5), lineitem(o_orderkey, p_partkey, s_suppkey, l1, l_quantity, l_ep, l_discount, l2, l3, l4, l5, l6, l7, l8, l9, l10), partsupp(p_partkey, s_suppkey, ps1, ps_supplycost, ps2), nation(n_nationkey, n_name, n1, n2), orders(o_orderkey, o1, o2, o3, o_orderdate, o4, o5, o6, o7), p_name LIKE '%green%'.
Q(nation, o_year, sum(amount)) :- Q1(nation, o_year, amount).
RP('ARGENTINA',1993,35857.08).
ANS: Q.
LINEAGE FOR lineitem FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

Q(c_ck,c_n,sum(l_ep * (1-l_d)),c_ab,n_n,c_a,c_p,c_c) :- customer(c_ck,c_n,c_a,c_nk,c_p,c_ab,c1,c_c), orders(o_ok,c_ck,o1,o2,o_od,o3,o4,o5,o6), lineitem(o_ok,l1,l2,l3,l4,l_ep,l_d,l5,'R',l6,l7,l8,l9,l10,l11,l12), nation(c_nk,n_n,n2,n3), o_od >= '1993-10-01', o_od < '1994-01-01'.
RP(17,'Customer#000000017',27916.7564,6.34,'BRAZIL','izrh 6jdqtp2eqdtbkswDD8SG4SzXruMfIXyR7' ,'12-970-682-3487','packages wake! blithely even pint').
ANS: Q.
LINEAGE FOR lineitem FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

Qsub1(ps_pk,sum(ps_sc * ps_aq)):- partsupp(ps_pk,ps_sk,ps_aq,ps_sc,ps2), supplier(ps_sk,s1,s2,s_nk,s3,s4,s5), nation(s_nk,'IRAN',n1,n2).
Qsub2(sum((CAST (c2 AS float8))*0.0001)) :- Qsub1(c1, c2).
Q(c1,c2) :- Qsub1(c1, c2), Qsub2(c3), c2 > c3.
RP(4,138390.78).
ANS: Q.
LINEAGE FOR supplier FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

Q1(l_okey,l_linenumber,l_shipmode) :- lineitem(l_okey,x8,x9,l_linenumber,x11,x12,x13,x14,x15,x16,l_shipdate,l_commitdate,l_receiptdate,x17,l_shipmode,x18), l_commitdate < l_receiptdate, l_shipdate < l_commitdate, l_receiptdate >= '1994-01-01', l_receiptdate < '1995-01-01'.
Qshipmodes('SHIP'). Qshipmodes('MAIL').
Q2(l_okey,l_linenumber,l_shipmode) :- Q1(l_okey,l_linenumber,l_shipmode),Qshipmodes(l_shipmode).
Q(l_shipmode, sum(CASE WHEN o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' THEN 1 WHEN o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), sum(CASE WHEN o_orderpriority <> '1-URGENT' THEN (CASE WHEN o_orderpriority <> '2-HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ELSE 0 END)) :- orders(o_okey,x1,x2,x3,x4,o_orderpriority,x5,x6,x7), Q2(o_okey,l_linenumber,l_shipmode).
RP('MAIL',5,5).
ANS:Q.
LINEAGE FOR lineitem FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

Q1(c_custkey, count(o_orderkey)) :- customer(c_custkey,c1,c2,c3,c4,c5,c6,c7), orders(o_orderkey,c_custkey,o1, o2, o3,o4, o5,o6,o_comment), o_comment NOT LIKE '%special%requests%'.
Q1(c_custkey, 0) :- customer(c_custkey,c1,c2,c3,c4,c5,c6,c7).
Q2(c_custkey, sum(Y)) :- Q1(c_custkey, Y).
Q(c_count, count(1)) :- Q2(q1, c_count).
RP(3,1).
ANS: Q.
LINEAGE FOR orders FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

Q1(sum(CASE WHEN p_type LIKE 'PROMO%' THEN l_extp*(1-l_discount) ELSE 0 END), sum(l_extp*(1-l_discount))) :- part(p_partkey,p1,p2,p3,p_type,p4,p5,p6,p7), lineitem(l1,p_partkey,l2,l3,l4,l_extp,l_discount,l5,l6,l7,l_shipdate,l8,l9,l10,l11,l12), l_shipdate >= '1995-09-01', l_shipdate < '1995-10-01'.
RP('15.230212611597254').
Q(100 * (X / Y)) :- Q1(X,Y).
ANS: Q.
LINEAGE FOR lineitem FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

Q1(l_suppkey, sum(l_extp*(1-l_discount))) :- lineitem(l1,l2,l_suppkey,l3,l4,l_extp,l_discount,l5,l6,l7,l_shipdate,l8,l9,l10,l11,l12), l_shipdate >= '1996-01-01', l_shipdate < '1996-04-01'.
Q2(max(rev)) :- Q1(q1, rev).
Q(s_suppkey,s_name,s_address,s_phone,rev) :- supplier(s_suppkey,s_name,s_address,s1,s_phone,s2,s3), Q1(s_suppkey, rev), Q2(rev).
RP(10,'Supplier#000000010','Saygah3gYWMp72i PY','34-852-489-8585',797313.3838).
ANS: Q.

Qsizes(49). Qsizes(14). Qsizes(23). Qsizes(45). Qsizes(19). Qsizes(3). Qsizes(36). Qsizes(9).
Q(p_brand,p_type,p_size,count(s_suppkey)) :- Qaggin(p_brand,p_type,p_size,s_suppkey).
Qaggin(p_brand,p_type,p_size,ps_suppkey) :- Qfilter(p_brand,p_type,p_size,ps_suppkey), Qttlcom(ps_suppkey, 0).
Qttlcom(ps_suppkey, sum(cnt)) :- Qcomplaints(ps_suppkey, cnt).
Qcomplaints(s_suppkey,1) :- supplier(s_suppkey,s1,s2,s3,s4,s5,s_comment), s_comment LIKE '%Customer%Complaints%'.
Qcomplaints(ps_suppkey,0) :- Qfilter(x1,x2,x3,ps_suppkey).
Qfilter(p_brand,p_type,p_size,ps_suppkey) :- partsupp(p_partkey,ps_suppkey,ps1,ps2,ps3), part(p_partkey,p1,p2,p_brand,p_type,p_size,p3,p4,p5), QSizes(p_size), p_brand != 'Brand#45', p_type NOT LIKE 'MEDIUM POLISHED%'.
RP('Brand#11','SMALL PLATED COPPER',45,4).
ANS: Q.
LINEAGE FOR part FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

a0 | a1 | a2 | a3 | a4 | a5 | a6 | a7 | a8 | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ 7 | blue blanched tan indian olive | Manufacturer#1 | Brand#11 | SMALL PLATED COPPER | 45 | SM BAG | 907 | lyly. ex | 15 | navajo dark sky turquoise royal | Manufacturer#1 | Brand#15 | LARGE ANODIZED BRASS | 45 | LG CASE | 915.01 | usual ac | 25 | blush forest magenta metallic turquoise | Manufacturer#5 | Brand#55 | STANDARD BRUSHED COPPER | 3 | JUMBO BAG | 925.02 | requests wake | 35 | green blue coral antique sandy | Manufacturer#4 | Brand#43 | MEDIUM ANODIZED BRASS | 14 | JUMBO PACK | 935.03 | e carefully furi | 36 | chiffon smoke floral misty navy | Manufacturer#2 | Brand#25 | SMALL BURNISHED COPPER | 3 | JUMBO CAN | 936.03 | olites o | 45 | lemon medium frosted indian linen | Manufacturer#4 | Brand#43 | SMALL BRUSHED NICKEL | 9 | WRAP BAG | 945.04 | nts bo | 54 | peach smoke yellow pale cornflower | Manufacturer#2 | Brand#21 | LARGE BURNISHED COPPER | 19 | WRAP CASE | 954.05 | e blithely | 55 | antique cream pale tomato rose | Manufacturer#2 | Brand#23 | ECONOMY BRUSHED COPPER | 9 | MED BAG | 955.05 | ly final pac | 57 | purple blue tan goldenrod medium | Manufacturer#3 | Brand#32 | MEDIUM BURNISHED BRASS | 49 | MED PKG | 957.05 | lly abov | 65 | slate lavender tomato black floral | Manufacturer#5 | accounts sleep qu | 90 | ghost goldenrod violet blue purple | Manufacturer#5 | Brand#51 | ECONOMY POLISHED STEEL | 49 | JUMBO CAN | 990.09 | caref | 95 | coral chocolate wheat smoke magenta | Manufacturer#3 | Brand#33 | LARGE BRUSHED TIN | 36 | WRAP DRUM | 995.09 | final pinto beans | 103 | navy cream lime orange metallic | Manufacturer#2 | Brand#25 | MEDIUM PLATED BRASS | 45 | WRAP DRUM | 1003.1 | e blithely blith | 113 | almond coral royal honeydew lawn | Manufacturer#3 | Brand#31 | PROMO POLISHED TIN | 23 | LG CAN | 1013.11 | finally even | 120 | navy chocolate frosted burnished moccasin | Manufacturer#1 | Brand#14 | SMALL ANODIZED NICKEL | 45 | WRAP JAR | 1020.12 | lly a | 127 | moccasin green orchid blue blanched | Manufacturer#5 | Brand#52 | SMALL BURNISHED NICKEL | 14 | LG JAR | 1027.12 | lithely expr | 133 | navajo black dim peru deep | Manufacturer#1 | Brand#13 | SMALL BRUSHED NICKEL | 19 | LG PKG | 1033.13 | final pinto beans | 140 | frosted chiffon thistle sky grey | Manufacturer#5 | Brand#53 | STANDARD PLATED STEEL | 45 | SM BOX | 1040.14 | oss the carefu | 141 | peru sienna salmon snow gainsboro | Manufacturer#3 | Brand#35 | STANDARD ANODIZED STEEL | 23 | SM PKG | 1041.14 | ans nag furiously pen | 151 | chartreuse lime slate white thistle | Manufacturer#3 | Brand#34 | LARGE PLATED BRASS | 45 | MED CAN | 1051.15 | ccounts nag i | 175 | azure blanched chartreuse moccasin ghost | Manufacturer#1 | Brand#11 | PROMO ANODIZED TIN | 45 | JUMBO JAR | 1075.17 | ole against the | 181 | almond burlywood smoke peru dark | Manufacturer#2 | Brand#24 | MEDIUM PLATED STEEL | 19 | WRAP CAN | 1081.18 | al deposits | 188 | gainsboro steel rosy dim drab | Manufacturer#5 | Brand#54 | ECONOMY ANODIZED BRASS | 9 | MED CAN | 1088.18 | above the silent p | 190 | chartreuse khaki ivory chiffon bisque | Manufacturer#5 | Brand#53 | LARGE BURNISHED NICKEL | 23 | WRAP BAG | 1090.19 | furiously even d | 196 | pale blush lime grey blue | Manufacturer#3 | Brand#33 | SMALL BURNISHED NICKEL | 3 | JUMBO JAR | 1096.19 | uickly special | 199 | royal slate lace olive gainsboro | Manufacturer#3 | Brand#31 | ECONOMY PLATED STEEL | 23 | JUMBO DRUM | 1099.19 | ickly regul |

Qsub(l_pk,avg(0.2*l_q)):- lineitem(l1,l_pk,l2,l3,l_q,l_ep,l4,l5,l6,l7,l8,l9,l10,l11,l12,l13).
Q(sum(l_ep/7.0)):- Qsub(l_pk,q2), part(l_pk,p1,p2,'Brand#34',p3,p4,'MED BAG',p5,p6), lineitem(l1,l_pk,l2,l3,l_q,l_ep,l4,l5,l6,l7,l8,l9,l10,l11,l12,l13), l_q < q2.
RP(2256.321428571429).
ANS: Q.
LINEAGE FOR lineitem FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

Q1(l_orderkey, sum(l_quantity)):- lineitem(l_orderkey, X1, X2, X3, l_quantity, X4, X5, X6, X7, X8, X9, X10, X11, X12, X13, X14).
Q(c_name, c_custkey, o_orderkey, o_orderdate, o_totalprice, sum(l_quantity)) :- customer(c_custkey, c_name, C1, C2, C3, C4, C5, C6), orders(o_orderkey, c_custkey, O1, o_totalprice, o_orderdate, O2, O3, O4, O5), lineitem(o_orderkey, X1, X2, X3, l_quantity, X4, X5, X6, X7, X8, X9, X10, X11, X12, X13, X14), Q1(o_orderkey, t1), t1 > 250.0.
RP('Customer#000000070',70,2567,CAST('1998-02-27' as date),263411.29,266).
ANS: Q.
LINEAGE FOR lineitem FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

Qquantities(1,1,11). Qquantities(2,10,20). Qquantities(3,20,30).
Qpsize(1,5). Qpsize(2,10). Qpsize(3,15).
Qbrand(1,'Brand#12'). Qbrand(2,'Brand#23'). Qbrand(3,'Brand#34').
Qcontainer(1,'SM CASE'). Qcontainer(1,'SM BOX'). Qcontainer(1,'SM PACK'). Qcontainer(1,'SM PKG'). Qcontainer(2,'MED BAG'). Qcontainer(2,'MED BOX'). Qcontainer(2,'MED PACK'). Qcontainer(2,'MED PKG'). Qcontainer(3,'LG CASE'). Qcontainer(3,'LG BOX'). Qcontainer(3,'LG PACK'). Qcontainer(3,'LG PKG').
Qoptions(x1,x2,x3,x4,x5) :- Qquantities(id,x1,x2), Qcontainer(id,x3), Qpsize(id,x4), Qbrand(id,x5).
Qshipmodes('AIR'). Qshipmodes('AIR REG'). Qshipmodes('TRAIN'). Qshipmodes('TRUCK'). Qshipmodes('MAIL'). Qshipmodes('RAIL'). Qshipmodes('FOB'). Qshipmodes('SHIP').
Qfilter(l_orderkey, l_linenumber, l_discount, l_extp) :- lineitem(l_orderkey,p_partkey,l2,l_linenumber,l_quantity,l_extp,l_discount,l4,l5,l6,l7,l8,l9,l_deliver,l_shipmode,l10), part(p_partkey,p1,p2,p_brand,p3,p_size,p_container,p4,p5), Qshipmodes(l_shipmode), Qoptions(q_low, q_high, p_container, p_high, p_brand), l_quantity >= q_low, l_quantity <= q_high, p_size >= 1, p_size <= p_high.
Q(sum(l_extp * (1-l_discount))) :- Qfilter(l_orderkey, l_linenumber, l_discount, l_extp).
RP(40436.816999999995).
ANS: Q.
LINEAGE FOR lineitem FOR RESULTS FROM RP.

Q1(l_partkey,l_suppkey,sum(0.5*l_quantity)) :- lineitem(l1,l_partkey,l_suppkey,l2,l_quantity,l3,l4,l5,l6,l7,l_shipdate,l8,l9,l10,l11,l12), l_shipdate >= '1994-01-01', l_shipdate < '1995-01-01'.
Q2(s_suppkey) :- part(p_partkey, p_name,p1,p2,p3,p4,p5,p6,p7), partsupp(p_partkey,s_suppkey,s_available,s1,s2), Q1(p_partkey,s_suppkey,quantity), s_available > quantity, p_name LIKE 'forest%'.
Q(s_name,s_address) :- supplier(s_suppkey,s_name,s_address,n_nationkey,s1,s2,s3), nation(n_nationkey,n_name,n1,n2), Q2(s_suppkey).
RP('Supplier#000000006','tQxuVm7s7CnK').
ANS: Q.
LINEAGE FOR lineitem FOR RESULTS FROM RP.
